# Parry — AI Procurement Intelligence

## What is Parry?
Parry is the AI reasoning layer for enterprise procurement. Multiple autonomous AI agents manage the entire vendor value chain — from benchmarking and negotiation through billing verification and collections.

## What does Parry do?
- Manages the full vendor lifecycle with autonomous AI agents
- Benchmarks vendor pricing against market data and internal precedents
- Detects hidden risks and contradictions across vendor relationships
- Handles back-office procurement operations at scale
- Verifies billing accuracy — ensuring what was agreed is what gets charged
- Provides real-time intelligence during vendor negotiations
- Builds institutional procurement knowledge that compounds over time

## Who is Parry for?
Enterprise procurement teams, CFOs, CPOs, and finance leaders at companies managing complex vendor portfolios. Parry is currently partnering with select Fortune 500 enterprises.

## How is Parry different?
Every other procurement AI tool automates a single workflow — buying faster. Parry is the only platform that reasons across the entire value chain — from the first vendor conversation through the final invoice. Powered by a knowledge graph that gets smarter with every vendor interaction.

## Company
- Based in Tel Aviv, Israel
- Website: https://www.parry-io.com
- Contact: yehonatan@parry-io.com
